CustomField.description: Stable signal-identity key enforcing at-most-once delivery per (instance, key) pair. For routed signals with a caller-supplied idempotency key this holds SHA-256-hex(instanceId + '::' + callerKey), scoping dedup to the instance. For unrouted signals arriving via WorkflowEventTrigger it holds the platform-event EventUuid. Null for keyless signals (at-least-once). Multiple nulls are permitted (Salesforce unique fields allow multiple nulls).
CustomField.label: Signal Key
